entity.label: Bethany
entity.subtitle: Place
entity.description: The Revised Version in John 1:28 has this word instead of Bethabara, on the authority of the oldest manuscripts. It appears to have been the name of a place on the east of Jordan.

nodes.label: Bethany
nodes.description: The Revised Version in John 1:28 has this word instead of Bethabara, on the authority of the oldest manuscripts. It appears to have been the name of a place on the east of Jordan.

verses.text: These things were done in Bethabara beyond Jordan, where John was baptizing.
